experience.title: Office Assistant
experience.description: Provides general administrative and clerical support for smooth daily operations. Organizes physical and electronic files for easy access. Tracks inventory and replenishes supplies. Sorts and distributes mail and packages. Enters information into databases and prepares reports.

experience.title: Student Assistant
experience.description: Maintained cleanliness across dorm buildings. Collaborated with staff to complete daily tasks. Assisted students and staff with questions and provided friendly support.

experience.title: Hostess
experience.description: Greeted and seated 100+ guests daily, reducing wait times by improving seating structure. Resolved guest concerns quickly. Trained new hostesses and improved team efficiency.
